response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and enterprise tooling, along with his contributions to open-source projects and workshops, showcases deep technical expertise and leadership. While his experience with Kotlin/Java is limited, his adaptability and problem-solving skills compensate for this gap.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (6+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements.
Proven track record in AI-agent development and enterprise tooling, including contributions to scalability and performance optimizations.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating leadership and knowledge-sharing.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Kotlin/Java, a secondary technology for the role.
Some roles involved embedded systems or niche languages (e.g., DLang), which may not directly translate to the required stack.
Geographic location (Berlin) may require remote work arrangements, though this is not a technical concern.
